description_long: This is a public telephone booth with a rectangular metal enclosure, painted primarily in blue and black, and mounted on a sturdy black pedestal with a concrete base. The front is open, revealing a payphone unit with a visible handset, keypad, and coin slot, all set against a blue interior panel. The side panels feature decorative white backgrounds with blue floral or abstract line art, and the word 'Phone' is displayed at the top of each side. The back is solid blue metal, providing structural support and weather protection. The booth is designed for outdoor urban environments, offering shelter for users while they make phone calls.
description: A blue and black public telephone booth with open front, visible payphone, and decorative side panels labeled 'Phone'. Mounted on a black pedestal with a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open booth, payphone unit, handset, keypad, and coin slot clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the decorative white and blue panel with 'Phone' signage and the solid black pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid blue metal back and the supporting pedestal structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the decorative panel and 'Phone' signage visible.
attribute_window_configuration: no visible windows, solid side and back panels
attribute_signage_or_labeling: White 'Phone' signage at the top of each side panel and above the payphone, blue text on white background
